{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer",
  "description": "Bozinda Travels into tourism, ticketing, and Travelling, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos

Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day office operations
	Maintain and organize company records and documents
	Prepare reports, spreadsheets, and presentations
	Coordinate schedules, meetings, and correspondence
	Support management with administrative tasks
	Handle data entry, filing, and documentation.


Requirements


	Minimum of an OND / HND / B.Sc in any related field
	1 - 2 years of experience in an admin role
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, formulas, reports)
	Comfortable using digital tools, apps and software
	Excellent communication and organizational skills
	Attention to detail and ability to multitask
	Proximity to Ikoyi is an advantage.


What We Are Looking For:


	A self-starter who is organized and proactive
	Someone who takes initiative without being told twice
	Tech-savvy and comfortable with Google Workspace and MS Office.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letter to: thepistisfirmtalent@gmail.com using &quot;Admin Officer - Bozinda Travels&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Administrative Officer Job at Bozinda Travels




        
    

        
        Bozinda Travels into tourism, ticketing, and Travelling, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos

Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day office operations
	Maintain and organize company records and documents
	Prepare reports, spreadsheets, and presentations
	Coordinate schedules, meetings, and correspondence
	Support management with administrative tasks
	Handle data entry, filing, and documentation.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Minimum of an OND / HND / B.Sc in any related field
	1 - 2 years of experience in an admin role
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, formulas, reports)
	Comfortable using digital tools, apps and software
	Excellent communication and organizational skills
	Attention to detail and ability to multitask
	Proximity to Ikoyi is an advantage.


What We Are Looking For:


	A self-starter who is organized and proactive
	Someone who takes initiative without being told twice
	Tech-savvy and comfortable with Google Workspace and MS Office.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letter to: [email protected] using "Admin Officer - Bozinda Travels" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Manager",
  "description": "Glovo is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world&rsquo;s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience&mdash;fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time / Hybrid

Responsibilities


	Establish excellent relationships with Glovo&rsquo;s partners through consistent and proactive communication, identifying their needs and building engagement&nbsp;
	Be responsible for your partners&#39; business performance and ensure their growth. Build reports and analyze main KPIs. Take action to reach your goals and company OKRs
	Own partners&#39; relationships end to end, from the top to the bottom line of the P&amp;L&nbsp;
	Get feedback from partners and translate it into product, marketing, and operations improvement.&nbsp;
	Guarantee partners&#39; content quality
	Increase Glovo&#39;s visibility through marketing activations with partners in their offline stores
	Improve Glovo&rsquo;s revenue through commission renegotiations and monetization of your partners
	Be the main point of contact between Glovo&#39;s different areas and the partner


Qualifications


	You have 3+ years of relevant hands-on sales / account management /Consulting experience
	Strong Commercial skills &amp; Negotiation Skills&nbsp;
	Strong analytical skills. Ability to look for the root cause of a problem and to solve it based on data
	Get things done attitude, proactive, organized, and obsessed with details
	Exceptional verbal and written communication skills with an aptitude for building strong client relationships
	A high level of interpersonal and influencing skills, an empathetic, inclusive, and curious attitude
	Comfortable working in a high-growth and high-performance start-up environment
	Fluency in French and a very good command of English are a must
	Proficiency in Google Applications. and MS Office (Excel)
	A degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or Engineering is a plus, SQL and visualization tools knowledge is a big plus.


Note


	At Glovo, your success is defined by both results and behaviors.
	We hire for excellence in craft and for the Leadership Principles that shape how we think, decide, and collaborate.
	What you achieve matters and how you achieve it defines us.
	Together, they move the business forward and deliver great experiences.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-19",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Glovo Nigeria"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198788"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Account Manager Job at Glovo Nigeria




        
    

        
        Glovo is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time / Hybrid

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Establish excellent relationships with Glovo’s partners through consistent and proactive communication, identifying their needs and building engagement 
	Be responsible for your partners' business performance and ensure their growth. Build reports and analyze main KPIs. Take action to reach your goals and company OKRs
	Own partners' relationships end to end, from the top to the bottom line of the P&L 
	Get feedback from partners and translate it into product, marketing, and operations improvement. 
	Guarantee partners' content quality
	Increase Glovo's visibility through marketing activations with partners in their offline stores
	Improve Glovo’s revenue through commission renegotiations and monetization of your partners
	Be the main point of contact between Glovo's different areas and the partner


Qualifications


	You have 3+ years of relevant hands-on sales / account management /Consulting experience
	Strong Commercial skills & Negotiation Skills 
	Strong analytical skills. Ability to look for the root cause of a problem and to solve it based on data
	Get things done attitude, proactive, organized, and obsessed with details
	Exceptional verbal and written communication skills with an aptitude for building strong client relationships
	A high level of interpersonal and influencing skills, an empathetic, inclusive, and curious attitude
	Comfortable working in a high-growth and high-performance start-up environment
	Fluency in French and a very good command of English are a must
	Proficiency in Google Applications. and MS Office (Excel)
	A degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or Engineering is a plus, SQL and visualization tools knowledge is a big plus.


Note


	At Glovo, your success is defined by both results and behaviors.
	We hire for excellence in craft and for the Leadership Principles that shape how we think, decide, and collaborate.
	What you achieve matters and how you achieve it defines us.
	Together, they move the business forward and deliver great experiences.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Marketing Associate",
  "description": "IO Furniture is Nigeria&rsquo;s premier interior design and furniture manufacturing company, offering bespoke solutions and high-quality craftsmanship across residential, commercial, and retail sectors. Our retail brand, PIQIT, delivers stylish, affordable furniture to a growing customer base seeking modern living.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Associate

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Reports To: Head of Retail
Department: Retail &amp; Marketing

Job Summary


	We are seeking a Marketing Associate who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and creatively driven to support our marketing efforts.
	Reporting directly to the Head of Retail, the ideal candidate will have retail marketing experience (preferably in furniture or lifestyle brands), be a quick and resourceful problem solver, and be confident managing timelines, events, and visual merchandising initiatives.
	This role will play a key part in implementing our marketing strategy, maintaining our brand presence, and ensuring our digital and physical platforms are compelling and up to date.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in executing the company&rsquo;s marketing strategy, ensuring all calendar deliverables are met on time.
	Coordinate and plan retail events, including product launches, showroom activations, pop-ups, and collaborations.
	Oversee site photography, including scheduling, documentation, image selection, and post-production follow-up.
	Ensure all marketing assets are organized and aligned with IO Furniture&rsquo;s brand guidelines.
	Manage the visual appeal and regular content updates for thee-commerce platform, ensuring product listings are engaging, accurate, and current.
	Support the creation of presentations, sales decks, reports, and communication materials using Microsoft Office tools.
	Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors (photographers, printers, stylists, etc.) to execute campaigns.
	Monitor competitor activities and assist with insight reports to inform marketing improvements.
	Have a good relationship with news paper outlets, and advertising platforms.
	Stay updated on digital trends and consumer behaviour to help evolve the brand&rsquo;s storytelling and visual communication.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of marketing or retail experience.
	Experience in a furniture, home, or lifestyle brand is an advantage.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially PowerPoint, Excel, and Word.
	Strong coordination and project management skills.
	Keen eye for detail and aesthetics.
	Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work independently in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong communication skills and a proactive, solution-driven mindset.
	Ability to use content creation platforms like Canva.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: human.resources@iofurnitureltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Marketing Associate Job at IO Furniture Limited




        
    

        
        IO Furniture is Nigeria’s premier interior design and furniture manufacturing company, offering bespoke solutions and high-quality craftsmanship across residential, commercial, and retail sectors. Our retail brand, PIQIT, delivers stylish, affordable furniture to a growing customer base seeking modern living.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Associate

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Reports To: Head of Retail
Department: Retail & Marketing

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a Marketing Associate who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and creatively driven to support our marketing efforts.
	Reporting directly to the Head of Retail, the ideal candidate will have retail marketing experience (preferably in furniture or lifestyle brands), be a quick and resourceful problem solver, and be confident managing timelines, events, and visual merchandising initiatives.
	This role will play a key part in implementing our marketing strategy, maintaining our brand presence, and ensuring our digital and physical platforms are compelling and up to date.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in executing the company’s marketing strategy, ensuring all calendar deliverables are met on time.
	Coordinate and plan retail events, including product launches, showroom activations, pop-ups, and collaborations.
	Oversee site photography, including scheduling, documentation, image selection, and post-production follow-up.
	Ensure all marketing assets are organized and aligned with IO Furniture’s brand guidelines.
	Manage the visual appeal and regular content updates for thee-commerce platform, ensuring product listings are engaging, accurate, and current.
	Support the creation of presentations, sales decks, reports, and communication materials using Microsoft Office tools.
	Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors (photographers, printers, stylists, etc.) to execute campaigns.
	Monitor competitor activities and assist with insight reports to inform marketing improvements.
	Have a good relationship with news paper outlets, and advertising platforms.
	Stay updated on digital trends and consumer behaviour to help evolve the brand’s storytelling and visual communication.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
	2–3 years of marketing or retail experience.
	Experience in a furniture, home, or lifestyle brand is an advantage.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially PowerPoint, Excel, and Word.
	Strong coordination and project management skills.
	Keen eye for detail and aesthetics.
	Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work independently in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong communication skills and a proactive, solution-driven mindset.
	Ability to use content creation platforms like Canva.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Engineer",
  "description": "HRM Office is an organization that provides technology-driven Human Resource services across Africa, focusing on recruitment, onboarding, talent development, payroll, performance management, organizational development, and outsourcing, aiming to make HR more strategic, efficient, and cost-effective for businesses with real-time data and virtual collaboration.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Oil &amp; Gas

Job Summary


	We are a reputable engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) company operating in the oil &amp; gas, energy, and industrial sectors, seeking an experienced and result-driven Project Engineer to join our Project/Supply Chain Department.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong technical and project coordination expertise, with proven ability to manage engineering deliverables, procurement activities, vendor engagement, project execution, and stakeholder communication across multiple projects.
	The role requires a highly organized professional with strong commercial awareness and engineering expertise, capable of ensuring projects are delivered safely, on schedule, within budget, and in compliance with industry standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate engineering, procurement, and project execution activities across assigned projects.
	Monitor project schedules, deliverables, milestones, and ensure timely completion of tasks.
	Prepare and review technical documents, project reports, BOQs, specifications, and engineering drawings.
	Liaise with vendors, contractors, clients, and internal teams to ensure seamless project execution.
	Support procurement processes including RFQs, bid evaluations, technical clarifications, and vendor selection.
	Track material procurement, equipment delivery timelines, and logistics coordination.
	Conduct project planning, risk assessment, and resource allocation for ongoing projects.
	Ensure compliance with HSE standards, company procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Participate in site inspections, project meetings, progress reviews, and commissioning activities where required.
	Prepare project progress reports, cost updates, and technical presentations for management and clients.
	Assist in contract administration, project documentation, and change-order management.
	Collaborate with supply chain and operations teams to optimize project efficiency and cost-effectiveness.
	Support quality assurance and quality control (QA/QC) processes throughout project lifecycle.
	Ensure proper documentation and close-out of completed projects.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Petroleum Engineering, or related engineering discipline.
	Minimum of 5&ndash;8 years of relevant experience in project engineering within the Oil &amp; Gas, EPC, Energy, or Industrial sector.
	Membership or registration with COREN and NSE is an added advantage.
	Project Management certifications such as PMP or PRINCE2 will be an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of engineering processes, procurement coordination, and project execution methodologies.
	Experience in flow station upgrades, pipeline projects, fabrication, construction, or industrial installations is highly desirable.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, MS Project, AutoCAD, Primavera, or other project management tools.
	Strong knowledge of HSE standards and oil &amp; gas industry regulations.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong reporting, documentation, and stakeholder-management abilities.


Salary
N500,000 &ndash; N700,000 monthly.",

Project Engineer Job at HRM Office




        
    

        
        HRM Office is an organization that provides technology-driven Human Resource services across Africa, focusing on recruitment, onboarding, talent development, payroll, performance management, organizational development, and outsourcing, aiming to make HR more strategic, efficient, and cost-effective for businesses with real-time data and virtual collaboration.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Oil & Gas

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are a reputable engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) company operating in the oil & gas, energy, and industrial sectors, seeking an experienced and result-driven Project Engineer to join our Project/Supply Chain Department.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong technical and project coordination expertise, with proven ability to manage engineering deliverables, procurement activities, vendor engagement, project execution, and stakeholder communication across multiple projects.
	The role requires a highly organized professional with strong commercial awareness and engineering expertise, capable of ensuring projects are delivered safely, on schedule, within budget, and in compliance with industry standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate engineering, procurement, and project execution activities across assigned projects.
	Monitor project schedules, deliverables, milestones, and ensure timely completion of tasks.
	Prepare and review technical documents, project reports, BOQs, specifications, and engineering drawings.
	Liaise with vendors, contractors, clients, and internal teams to ensure seamless project execution.
	Support procurement processes including RFQs, bid evaluations, technical clarifications, and vendor selection.
	Track material procurement, equipment delivery timelines, and logistics coordination.
	Conduct project planning, risk assessment, and resource allocation for ongoing projects.
	Ensure compliance with HSE standards, company procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Participate in site inspections, project meetings, progress reviews, and commissioning activities where required.
	Prepare project progress reports, cost updates, and technical presentations for management and clients.
	Assist in contract administration, project documentation, and change-order management.
	Collaborate with supply chain and operations teams to optimize project efficiency and cost-effectiveness.
	Support quality assurance and quality control (QA/QC) processes throughout project lifecycle.
	Ensure proper documentation and close-out of completed projects.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Petroleum Engineering, or related engineering discipline.
	Minimum of 5–8 years of relevant experience in project engineering within the Oil & Gas, EPC, Energy, or Industrial sector.
	Membership or registration with COREN and NSE is an added advantage.
	Project Management certifications such as PMP or PRINCE2 will be an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of engineering processes, procurement coordination, and project execution methodologies.
	Experience in flow station upgrades, pipeline projects, fabrication, construction, or industrial installations is highly desirable.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, MS Project, AutoCAD, Primavera, or other project management tools.
	Strong knowledge of HSE standards and oil & gas industry regulations.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong reporting, documentation, and stakeholder-management abilities.


Salary
N500,000 – N700,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Job Position: Electrical Electronics Technician

Description


	We are looking for a competent and experienced Electrical Electronics Technician to join our technical team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for troubleshooting, repairing, and maintaining industrial machines, PLC systems, and electrical/electronic equipment to ensure smooth production operations.

	Diagnose and repair faults on industrial machines and production equipment.
	Troubleshoot and maintain PLC systems, drives, sensors, control panels, and automation systems.
	Carry out preventive and corrective maintenance on electrical and electronic systems.

	Support machine setup, calibration, and operational efficiency.

	Ensure compliance with safety and maintenance procedures.
	Maintain accurate maintenance and repair records.

	HND / BSc or Technical certification in Electrical Electronics Engineering or related fields

	Good understanding of electrical control systems and industrial maintenance.
	Ability to work independently and within a team.
	Experience in a manufacturing environment is an added advantage.

	PLC troubleshooting and maintenance
	Machine fault diagnosis
	Preventive maintenance
	Technical problem-solving
	Attention to detail
	Teamwork and communication.

        Runola is a parent company with four subsidiaries (AdelooSuites, Runoplast, Runoclean, and RunoFeed)committed to delivering high-quality products and services to our customers. With a strong focus on innovation, efficiency, and excellence, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Electronics Technician

Job Location: Asaba, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for a competent and experienced Electrical Electronics Technician to join our technical team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for troubleshooting, repairing, and maintaining industrial machines, PLC systems, and electrical/electronic equipment to ensure smooth production operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Diagnose and repair faults on industrial machines and production equipment.
	Troubleshoot and maintain PLC systems, drives, sensors, control panels, and automation systems.
	Carry out preventive and corrective maintenance on electrical and electronic systems.
	Monitor machine performance and minimize downtime.
	Install, test, and maintain electrical wiring, panels, and machine controls.
	Support machine setup, calibration, and operational efficiency.
	Read and interpret electrical diagrams and technical drawings.
	Identify technical issues and recommend effective solutions.
	Ensure compliance with safety and maintenance procedures.
	Maintain accurate maintenance and repair records.


Requirements


	HND / BSc or Technical certification in Electrical Electronics Engineering or related fields
	Proven experience working with industrial machines, PLCs, and automation systems.
	Strong troubleshooting and fault-diagnosis skills.
	Good understanding of electrical control systems and industrial maintenance.
	Ability to work independently and within a team.
	Experience in a manufacturing environment is an added advantage.


Skills & Competencies:


	PLC troubleshooting and maintenance
	Machine fault diagnosis
	Preventive maintenance
	Technical problem-solving
	Attention to detail
	Teamwork and communication.


Method of Application
